chain.thought: Explanation: The Cessna 404 Titan entered service in 1991. The next aircraft to come into service after 1991 is the Piper PA-31 Navajo, which began service in 1993.

judge_thought: Explanation: The Cessna 404 Titan was in service from 1991 to 2008. The next aircraft to come into service after 1991 is the Piper PA-31 Navajo, which has the note “in service since 1993.” Later service entries (Beechcraft Super King Air 350 in 2004, Cessna 208 Caravan in 2007, Partenavia P.68 Observer in 2009) occur after 1993. Therefore, the Prediction Answer of null is incorrect.
